thumbx_exact_and_monotonic.detail: thumbX(value) = lerp(trackStart, trackEnd, value), exact within 1px and monotonic at sampled values (P-gate: slider semantics).

drag_inverse_roundtrip.detail: valueForThumbX inverts thumbXForValue within 1px and clamps drags beyond the track.

step_snapping.detail: snapSliderValue rounds to the step grid and clamps to [min, max].

theming_reskin_ge_3_palettes.detail: Filled rail + moss tint deterministically across >= 3 palettes.

manifest_contract_valid.detail: celstate.manifest.json passes assertLivingControlManifest; motionPath is procedural.

generated_skin_seam.detail: Optional `skin` prop accepts raster layers (moss, thumb) as ImageSourcePropType; value geometry remains runtime-owned. Procedural fallback when no skin is provided.

interaction_latency_le_1_frame.detail: Thumb tracks the finger via a shared value updated in the pan worklet on the UI thread; value reported via runOnJS (on-device confirmation pending).

accessibility_adjustable.detail: accessibilityRole=adjustable with increment/decrement accessibilityActions wired through the tested stepSliderValue; focusable with a visible focus ring (the §3.0 focused state of U_slider, operable not just visible).

measuredWebRuntimeProxy.disclaimer: Captured by rendering the SHARED pure core (packages/living-ui-runtime/src/control.ts: thumbXForValue, foliageTransform) on a real browser GPU surface via bundles/web-harness. This is an honest proxy that de-risks the C-gate — NOT the §9 device gate. iOS + Android fps/memory/right-size remain pending below.
measuredWebRuntimeProxy.command: pnpm exec node bundles/web-harness/serve.mjs  (then load / and read window.__harness)
measuredWebRuntimeProxy.notes: thumbX measured exact (0 px error) against thumbXForValue across value = 0.0 … 1.0 in 0.1 steps — well inside the P-gate's 1 px bound, on a live render rather than a unit assertion.

aliveness_2afc.requires: N >= 30 blind viewers, living vs static, p < 0.05 and effect >= 70/30.

fps_ge_58_ios_android.requires: Real iOS + Android devices, fps >= 58 at 1/10/50 instances.

memory_at_50.requires: Within device memory budget at K = 50.

installability_blank_expo_app.requires: A generic coding agent installs this bundle into a blank Expo app from README.md.
